title: Webcasts: ECB monetary policy decisions
summary: This is a navigation/portal page for ECB press conferences, not an actual monetary policy decision or statement. It contains links to press releases, statements, and projections, along with current ECB interest rates as of June 11, 2025 (deposit facility 2.00%, main refinancing operations 2.15%, marginal lending facility 2.40%). No specific policy decision or new information is presented on this page.
key_points: Page is a navigation hub linking to ECB press conference resources, not a standalone policy document
Current ECB rates as of June 11, 2025: deposit facility 2.00%, MRO 2.15%, marginal lending facility 2.40%
References upcoming press conference dates but does not contain policy content
No publication date provided for this page
Provides access to visual statements, projections, and audio streams
why_it_matters: This page serves as a gateway to ECB monetary policy communications but contains no new actionable information. It is useful for locating actual press conference content but should not be archived as a standalone policy record.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page (source_type: navigation_page) - explicitly rejected per Rule 5
No substantive policy content - only links to press releases, statements, and projections
No publication date provided - cannot assess recency or staleness
ECB interest rates displayed are from June 11, 2025 (deposit 2.00%, MRO 2.15%, marginal lending 2.40%) - approximately 9 months stale as of TODAY
event_type set to 'unknown' - appropriate for navigation page but confirms lack of archiveable content
Cannot serve as standalone archival record - only a portal linking to actual policy documents

notes: Non-archiveable navigation page. Does not contain actual monetary policy content. Source appears to be a portal page linking to press conference materials. The rates displayed (2.00%, 2.15%, 2.40%) are from June 11, 2025 and may not reflect current ECB policy as of March 2026. Recommend accessing specific press release or statement linked from this page instead.
